DEFINE
	VAR __DM3FilterTable = 
		TREATAS({"Azure"}, 'product'[Color])

	VAR __DS0Core = 
		SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
			ROLLUPADDISSUBTOTAL(
				'product'[Color], "IsGrandTotalRowTotal",
				'date'[Year Month], "IsDM1Total", NONVISUAL(__DM3FilterTable)
			),
			ROLLUPADDISSUBTOTAL('date'[Year], "IsGrandTotalColumnTotal"),
			"Order_Detail_Count", 'orderrows'[Order Detail Count],
			"Sales", 'orderrows'[Sales]
		)

	VAR __DS0PrimaryWindowed = 
		TOPN(
			102,
			SUMMARIZE(__DS0Core, 'product'[Color], [IsGrandTotalRowTotal], 'date'[Year Month], [IsDM1Total]),
			[IsGrandTotalRowTotal],
			0,
			'product'[Color],
			1,
			[IsDM1Total],
			0,
			'date'[Year Month],
			1
		)

	VAR __DS0SecondaryBase = 
		SUMMARIZE(__DS0Core, 'date'[Year], [IsGrandTotalColumnTotal])

	VAR __DS0Secondary = 
		TOPN(102, __DS0SecondaryBase, [IsGrandTotalColumnTotal], 1, 'date'[Year], 1)

	VAR __DS0BodyLimited = 
		NATURALLEFTOUTERJOIN(
			__DS0PrimaryWindowed,
			SUBSTITUTEWITHINDEX(
				__DS0Core,
				"ColumnIndex",
				__DS0Secondary,
				[IsGrandTotalColumnTotal],
				ASC,
				'date'[Year],
				ASC
			)
		)

EVALUATE
	__DS0Secondary

ORDER BY
	[IsGrandTotalColumnTotal], 'date'[Year]

EVALUATE
	__DS0BodyLimited

ORDER BY
	[IsGrandTotalRowTotal] DESC,
	'product'[Color],
	[IsDM1Total] DESC,
	'date'[Year Month],
	[ColumnIndex]

			ROLLUPADDISSUBTOTAL(ROLLUPGROUP('product'[Color], 'date'[Year]), "IsGrandTotalRowTotal"),
			"Order_Detail_Count", 'orderrows'[Order Detail Count],
			"Sales", 'orderrows'[Sales]
		)

	VAR __DS0PrimaryWindowed = 
		TOPN(502, __DS0Core, [IsGrandTotalRowTotal], 0, 'product'[Color], 1, 'date'[Year], 1)

EVALUATE
	__DS0PrimaryWindowed

ORDER BY
	[IsGrandTotalRowTotal] DESC, 'product'[Color], 'date'[Year]
